summary: Theron-Research citation-grounded research query with source attribution
description: Answers a research query with citation-grounded, source-attributed responses using Theron-Research. Sources are retrieved from a corpus of primary documents (academic papers, technical standards, government publications, regulatory filings). Every claim is attributed to a specific source with a URL or DOI. Hallucination rate measured at <0.3% on domain benchmarks. Suitable for literature reviews, due diligence, regulatory research, and technical background reports.
